Multiple Interpretations: Rav Zvid on the Order of Ye'ush and Shinuy Reshut; Rav Pappa on the Actual Garment
Takanat Hashuk When the Thief Is Known: Rav Says No Enactment; Rabbi Yochanan Says Yes, Even in This Case

Abaye's Solution: Original Purchaser Recovers Original Price from Owner; Second Purchaser Recovers Markup from First
Rava's Counterargument: Both Purchasers Should Be Equally Protected; Owner Pays Full Amount to Second Purchaser

micro_segments.title: The Mishnah: If One Spills Wine to Save Honey Without Agreement, Only Service Fee Is Owed
